Description: wasm-bindgen provides seamless Rust-JavaScript interop for WebAssembly modules
Do: Use #[wasm_bindgen] to export functions to JS; use wasm-pack for building; configure Cargo.toml with crate-type = ["cdylib"]
Dont: Manually write JavaScript glue code; use raw WASM imports/exports

Description: web-sys provides bindings to all Web APIs (DOM, Canvas, Fetch, WebSocket) for WASM
Do: Use web_sys features selectively; access document and window; manipulate DOM elements; handle events
Dont: Include all web-sys features (huge compile time); implement custom JS bindings
Code Bad: // Including everything:\n// web-sys = { version = "0.3", features = ["all"] }\n// massive compile time, huge WASM binary

Guideline: Use Leptos or Yew for full web apps
Description: For complete web applications in Rust+WASM use a component framework like Leptos or Yew
Do: Use Leptos for SSR + client hydration; Yew for SPA; use component-based architecture; handle state with signals or reducers
Dont: Build complex UIs by manually manipulating the DOM; use raw wasm-bindgen for UI logic

Description: WASM binaries must be small for fast page loads; optimize with LTO, wasm-opt, and code splitting
Do: Enable LTO and opt-level = 'z'; use wasm-opt; avoid pulling in large dependencies; use wee_alloc for smaller allocator
Dont: Ship debug WASM builds; include unnecessary crate features; skip size optimization
Code Good:
# Cargo.toml:
[profile.release]
lto = true
opt-level = 'z'
strip = true
panic = 'abort'

// Use smaller allocator:
use wee_alloc::WeeAlloc;
#[global_allocator]
static ALLOC: WeeAlloc = WeeAlloc::INIT;

# Post-processing:
# wasm-opt -Oz -o output.wasm input.wasm
Code Bad:
# Cargo.toml:
[profile.release]
# defaults: no LTO, opt-level = 3
# binary is 2-5x larger than optimized
# no wasm-opt post-processing

Description: Use wasm-bindgen-test for running tests inside a real browser or Node.js WASM environment
Do: Use #[wasm_bindgen_test] for WASM-specific tests; test in headless browser with wasm-pack test; test pure logic with regular #[test]
Dont: Only test with cargo test (misses WASM-specific behavior); skip browser testing
